title: cotula rosea
intro: Cotula rosea, also known as the Cotula or Bunched Buttons, is a perennial herb native to the coastal regions of Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cotula rosea include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease digestive discomfort, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for use in traditional medicine, and has also been used in skincare products for its antiseptic and moisturizing properties.
